title: Premier Housewares 33cm Set of 4 Gold Finish Ribbed Charger Plate Set | versatile Dinnerware Set Charger Plates for all Ocassions | Centrepiece Dinner Plates for Home
features: Chic Design with Gold Finish: Impress your guests with these stunning charger plates featuring a warm metallic gold finish, ribbed rims, and smooth edges. Perfect for festive occasions, weddings, or casual dinners.

Durable and Lightweight Build: Each plate measures H2 x L33 x W33cm and weighs just 0.30kg, ensuring durability without adding unnecessary bulk. The ideal size and weight make them practical, easy to use, and compatible with all dinnerware sets.
Versatile Tableware Addition: Enhance table decoration effortlessly with this side plates set of 4. Whether used as party tableware or paired with your favorite dinner plates.

Easy to Maintain: Keep these gold charger plates in pristine condition with minimal effort. Wipe clean with a dry cloth or wash with warm soapy water only. Their low-maintenance design ensures they remain a reliable part of your dinnerware.

Perfect for Any Occasion: These charger plates are more than just tableware—they are essential for creating memorable dining experiences. From intimate dinners to grand celebrations, their timeless elegance complements any dinner set.
description: Bring drama and style to your dining with the Premier Housewares Set of 4 Red Baroque Charger Plates. Featuring scalloped edges and a floral embossed rim, these 33cm plates add rich elegance to holiday tables, parties, or everyday use. Made from durable polypropylene, they are lightweight, easy to handle, and designed to complement both casual and formal dinnerware. For easy care, simply wipe clean with a dry cloth. Bold and festive, they create a striking backdrop for your meals.
